title: Biden family adopts 2 black lab mixes from Tennessee rescue
shortDescription: The former president and first lady adopted the two black lab mixes from a rescue organization in Tennessee.

title: Why does Trump want to deny citizenship to babies of foreign tourists?
shortDescription: Companies like USA Happy Baby and Star Baby Care brought pregnant women into the United States to give birth. It's part of a big case hitting the Supreme Court.

title: John Fetterman's political shift draws ire of Pennsylvania Democrats
shortDescription: Pennsylvania Sen. John Fetterman faces backlash from his own party for his support of Israel, Trump nominees and the Iran war.

title: No to Trump? 'No Kings' rallies a massive show of political force
shortDescription: With a Revolutionary-era slogan, the protests had an historic geographical reach across the country. What does that mean for November?

title: New York City protests Trump at ‘No Kings’
shortDescription: Protesters gathered to voice their frustration with Donald Trump, ICE and corporations at the 'No Kings' protest in New York City.

title: Tim Walz calls out Trump at ‘No Kings’ protest
shortDescription: MN Gov. Tim Walz had harsh words for President Trump at the 'No Kings' protest, calling him a "dictator" and referring to ICE agents as "thugs."

title: Bannon tells CPAC 'people got to have his back' on Trump's Iran war
shortDescription: Former White House adviser Steve Bannon teased that the Iran war may only be beginning.

title: Trump reacts to Tiger Woods crash
shortDescription: President Trump said he "feels so badly" following the first reports that Tiger Woods was involved in a rollover crash in Florida.

title: War in Iran hits one month. US considers adding troops
shortDescription: The attack by Iran comes as the U.S. considers deploying additional troops to the Middle East. More than 300 U.S. troops have been wounded in the war.

title: Trump wants to limit birthright citizenship. What history tells us.
shortDescription: President Trump isn't the first to try to limit birthright citizenship. Here's what history tells us about past efforts.

title: DHS shutdown impasse leaves House, Senate Republicans openly at odds
shortDescription: Divisions between House and Senate Republicans split wide into public view over the intractable DHS shutdown.

title: Where do Trump’s negotiations stand with Iran: See updates
shortDescription: The Pentagon is considering sending as many as 10,000 troops to the region as talks show little sign of progress.

title: Trump teases Strait of Hormuz as the 'Strait of Trump'
shortDescription: President Trump referred to the Strait of Hormuz as the "Strait of Trump" but noted the aside was intended as a joke.

title: What to know about Tiger Woods' girlfriend, connection to Trump
shortDescription: Tiger Woods was in a rollover crash on March 27. His girlfriend is Vanessa Trump, once married to President Donald Trump's eldest son.

title: Jane Fonda leads protest at Kennedy Center defending First Amendment
shortDescription: Jane Fonda, Joan Baez and other cultural leaders rally outside the Kennedy Center to speak out against censorship and political pressure.

title: DHS funding out of reach after GOP rejects deal
shortDescription: There's no end in sight to the Department of Homeland Security shutdown as House and Senate Republicans operate on different wavelengths.

title: 'That's a beautiful tractor,' Trump speaks to farmers at White House
shortDescription: President Trump admired a gold-wrapped tractor on the White House lawn while addressing farmers about lowering costs.
